overrides.C0684:
<?php
// C0684 · REST CRUD JSON
namespace App\Controllers;
use CodeIgniter\RESTful\ResourceController;

class Items extends ResourceController {
  protected $format = 'json';
  private static $items = [];
  private static $seq = 1;

  public function index() { return $this->respond(array_values(self::$items)); }
  public function create() {
    $name = (string)($this->request->getJSON(true)['name'] ?? '');
    $it = ['id'=> self::$seq++, 'name'=>$name];
    self::$items[$it['id']] = $it;
    return $this->respondCreated($it);
  }
}
// Routes: $routes->resource('items'); o $routes->post('items', 'Items::create');
